name: apostl-skills
description: Public Apostl agent skills for developer journey verification.

scripts.skillify: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); rsync -a --exclude .git ./ "$tmpdir/apostl-skillify-check/"; cd "$tmpdir/apostl-skillify-check" && GBRAIN_SKILLS_DIR="$PWD/skills" gbrain skillify check skills/sdk-onboarding-audit/scripts/run_sdk_onboarding_audit.py; rc=$?; rm -r "$tmpdir"; exit $rc
